name: A Pilot Study on Reverse Aging (The REVERSE Study)
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov active-not-recruiting 52-participant early phase 1 randomized open-label prevention pilot of weekly rapamycin and fasting-mimicking diet in adults aged 50 to 80, using OMICm methylation age, cognition, insulin-resistance, and safety endpoints with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
